🧪 Test Quality Audit 16 weak test(s)
Tests below contain no real assertion or only tautological/vacuous checks. They always pass — they don't actually verify anything about the app, contributing only noise to the report.
SeverityTestIssueLocation

To fix: open the test file and replace the weak assertion with one that actually checks the expected outcome (e.g. assert exact text, URL, or DOM state — not X >= 0 or True).

📋 What this test was checking
Page title is meaningful and includes brand presence — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Page title is meaningful and includes brand presence.
✗ What actually happened

🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa03_sqli_no_leak_db_errors 🕐 2026-05-20 06:21:13 ⏱ 15.39s
📋 What this test was checking
SQL injection payloads in input fields do not leak SQL database errors — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: ') OR 1=1#.
🧪 Test data used
params: [') OR 1=1#] · src: fill(payload) · BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Use these parameters: ') OR 1=1#
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
SQL injection payloads in input fields do not leak SQL database errors.
✗ What actually happened
The test tried to type into a field, but the field was not enabled within 15000ms. The page may be slow, the field is disabled, or the wrong element was matched.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
No screenshot captured (test may have failed before page loaded)
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None

E   Call log:
E     - waiting for locator("#email").first

  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en

Every application/json response received parses successfully as valid JSON.
✗ What actually happened
